adminCustomerWorkspace.noScreens: No screens registered for this branch yet.

adminCustomers.pageDescription: Customer-centric CRM: subscription status, branches, and actions. Open a profile to manage workspaces and usage.

hero.headline: Enterprise signage orchestration, powered by AI
hero.description: Build dynamic content pipelines, deploy instantly to your fleet, and monitor every screen in real time.

auth.title: Sign in to Cloud Signage
auth.description: Use your enterprise credentials to continue.

screens.title: Screens
screens.description: Manage hardware endpoints, statuses, and provisioning across your workspace.

mediaLibrary.description: Upload images and video, preview thumbnails, and curate assets for your playlists.

playlistStudio.description: Compose playlists from your media library, set durations, and reorder items. Saving syncs to assigned screens in real time.

studio.noLayers: No layers yet. Add objects to the canvas.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.description: Control when each playlist airs with a weekly timeline, priority rules, and instant overrides. Drag blocks to adjust hours; orange highlights show overlapping windows.
schedules.engineDesc: Workspace timezone drives all comparisons. Higher priority wins when two schedules overlap.
schedules.overrideDesc: Force a playlist to play immediately on a screen, bypassing the calendar until the override expires.
schedules.createDesc: Assign a playlist to recurring hours. Leave screen empty to apply to every screen in the workspace.
schedules.formInvalid: Choose a playlist and at least one day.
schedules.dayHint: Tap a day to include or exclude it. Labels follow your locale.
schedules.emptyDescription: Create your first schedule to control when playlists air on your screens.

teamPage.title: Team
teamPage.description: Members, roles, and invitations for this workspace.

billingPage.title: Billing & plans
billingPage.description: Subscription status, usage, and Stripe checkout when you are ready to upgrade.

adminWorkspaces.pageDescription: List view for quick audit: every workspace, owner (links to customer profile when billable), screens, media, and storage.
adminWorkspaces.auditHint: Quick audit list — open a customer profile from the owner when available.
adminWorkspaces.emptyDescription: Workspaces are created when customers or staff provision branches.
adminWorkspaces.mockSuccess: Workspace plan set to {plan} (internal mock). Connected dashboards update live.

adminScreensClient.pageDescription: Every screen across workspaces: connection health, offline-cache playback flag from the player heartbeat, and last seen time.
adminScreensClient.hint: Offline cache is reported by the player when it cannot reach the bootstrap API or has switched to cached playlists.
adminScreensClient.emptyDescription: Screens appear after players pair with a workspace.

adminFleetClient.pageDescription: Every screen in the platform: workspace, player type, and reachability (same rules as the client fleet view).
adminFleetClient.hint: Status uses heartbeats: briefly disconnected players may show as stale or offline.
adminFleetClient.emptyDescription: Screens appear after players pair with a workspace.

screensClient.playbackPlaylistAria: Choose playlist to play on this screen

dialogs.screenLimitReached: Screen limit reached ({limit} screens for this workspace). Remove a screen or upgrade your plan.

mediaClient.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Remove the asset from playlists first.

helpPage.title: Help & support
helpPage.description: Guides, FAQs, and contact options to help you get the most out of Cloud Signage.
helpPage.contactDescription: Our support team is available to assist you with any questions or issues.

guides.screensDesc: Add, pair, and monitor your display devices.
guides.mediaDesc: Upload, organize, and manage your images and videos.
guides.playlistsDesc: Combine media into playlists for your screens.
guides.schedulesDesc: Set when playlists should play on your screens.
guides.teamDesc: Invite members and manage roles in your workspace.
guides.studioDesc: Design custom layouts with the visual canvas editor.

faq.q1: How do I pair a screen?
faq.a1: Navigate to Screens, click 'Add screen', and follow the pairing instructions. Enter the 6-digit code displayed on your screen device.
faq.a2: We support common image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG) and video formats (MP4, WebM). Files are automatically optimized for display.
faq.a3: Schedules let you define which playlist plays on which screen at specific times. You can set day-of-week and time ranges for each schedule.
faq.a4: Yes, you can create multiple workspaces (branches) to organize your screens by location, department, or client. Switch between them using the workspace switcher in the sidebar.
faq.q5: How do I invite team members?
faq.a5: Go to the Team page, enter the email address of the person you want to invite, select their role, and click 'Send invite'. They will receive an email invitation.
faq.q6: What happens when my subscription expires?
faq.a6: Your screens will continue displaying cached content, but you won't be able to make changes until you renew. Contact support to restore your subscription.

apiDocs.title: API documentation
apiDocs.description: REST API reference for integrating with Cloud Signage. All endpoints require JWT authentication unless noted.

cards.webhooksDesc: Subscribe to real-time events like screen status changes and playlist updates.

workspaceSummary.title: {name}

branchDetail.pairingModalDescription: On the display, open the player app so it shows a 6-digit pairing session code. Enter that code here to link the screen to this branch.

branchDetail.playlistDeleteBody: This removes the playlist from this branch. Playlists assigned to screens or used in schedules cannot be deleted until you clear those links.
branchDetail.playlistDeleteBodyForce: You are about to force-delete this playlist. Screen and schedule links will be cleared automatically. Playback may stop until you assign another playlist.
branchDetail.playlistDeleteForceHint: Use only if you understand that linked screens and schedules will be updated and may need a new playlist.
branchDetail.playlistMoved: Playlist copied to the other branch and removed here.

branchDetail.playlistMovePartial: Copied to the other branch, but the original could not be removed: {message}
branchDetail.playlistMoveHint: A full copy is created (media and studio designs are duplicated in the target branch). If you can manage playlists here, the original is removed after the copy succeeds.

registerClient.legalPrefix: By creating an account you agree to our

legal.privacyLead: This page describes how Cloud Signage handles data in the product. Replace with counsel-approved text before production launch.
legal.privacyP1: We process account and workspace data to operate the service, including authentication, billing when enabled, and content delivery to your screens.
legal.privacyP2: You can export or delete workspace content through the dashboard where supported; contact support for account-level requests.
legal.privacyP3: Analytics and error reporting may use third-party subprocessors when you enable optional monitoring (for example Sentry) via environment configuration.
legal.termsLead: Placeholder terms for development. Obtain jurisdiction-specific legal review before inviting paying customers.
legal.termsP1: The service is provided as-is during beta and early access periods unless otherwise agreed in writing.
legal.termsP2: You are responsible for content shown on your displays and for complying with local advertising and accessibility rules.
legal.termsP3: Paid subscriptions, when used, are billed through Stripe subject to Stripe’s terms and the subscription plan you select.

errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: That email address is already registered.

errors.INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED: Email delivery is not configured yet.
errors.NO_WORKSPACE_ACCESS: You do not have access to this workspace.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_WORKSPACE_ROLE: Your role does not allow this action.
errors.SCREEN_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached your plan limit of {limit} screens. Upgrade to add more.
errors.STORAGE_LIMIT_REACHED: You have run out of storage. Delete some media or upgrade your plan.
errors.INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_PAIRING_CODE: That pairing code is invalid or has expired.
errors.TOO_MANY_FAILED_PAIRING_ATTEMPTS: Too many incorrect codes. Try again in {retryAfterSeconds} seconds.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: That file type is not supported.
errors.MEDIA_IN_USE: Remove this media from your playlists before deleting it.
errors.TOO_MANY_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Try again in {retryAfterSeconds} seconds.
